title: Panel Reviewing Trump's White House Ballroom Project Gets Earful From Public Opposing It
summary_full: Trump's proposed White House ballroom is "ugly," "grossly out of scale" and a "gold gilded edifice to one man's ego," according to members of the public who got a chance to speak their minds  to a federal panel that's reviewing it.
